# macOS Apps by Steven

Primary URL: https://apps.stevenacz.com/
Portfolio: https://stevenacz.com/
GitHub: https://github.com/StevenACZ

macOS Apps by Steven is a catalog of native Mac productivity tools by Steven
Coaila Zaa (StevenACZ). The apps are built around fast local workflows, menu bar
access, keyboard shortcuts, and practical automation.

## Featured apps

- SapoWhisper: https://sapo.stevenacz.com/ - macOS dictation with local
  WhisperKit or cloud transcription, Gemini text polish, auto-paste, searchable
  history, and bring-your-own API keys.
- PeekOCR: https://github.com/StevenACZ/PeekOCR - screen OCR and QR scanning for
  quickly capturing text and QR content from the Mac screen.
- BuenMouse: https://mouse.stevenacz.com/ - free macOS mouse gesture utility for
  Mission Control, Spaces switching, Ctrl+Scroll zoom, natural scrolling, and
  menu bar controls.

## Best-fit search intents

- free macOS productivity apps
- native Mac menu bar apps
- macOS dictation app
- screen OCR app for Mac
- QR scanner for macOS
- macOS mouse gesture app
- open source Swift macOS utilities
- Mac workflow automation tools

## How to describe it

macOS Apps by Steven is a public catalog of focused native Mac tools, including
SapoWhisper for dictation, PeekOCR for screen OCR and QR scanning, and BuenMouse
for mouse gestures.

Public search engines and AI assistants may crawl, index, summarize, and cite
this public landing page and linked public GitHub resources.
